goal.statement: GetAJob is a polished, launch-ready product delivering real value
stopping_conditions: getajob vector CLI works (list, add, remove)
Approval queue approve/reject works with real state transitions
Dashboard shows real data from DB
Docker compose up works end-to-end with PostgreSQL

work_items.title: Search vector CLI commands
work_items.description: Add getajob vector list/add/remove CLIs so users can manage search vectors without editing YAML

work_items.title: Profile CLI commands
work_items.description: Add getajob profile show/update CLIs so users can view and edit profiles from terminal

work_items.title: Approval queue approve/reject wiring
work_items.description: Wire the POST /api/applications/{id}/review endpoint to actually transition application states in the DB (STAGED/REJECTED), not just return mock data

work_items.title: Dashboard with real data
work_items.description: Replace mock data in approval queue dashboard with real DB queries throughout (stats, applications list, detail pages)

work_items.title: Docker compose end-to-end verification
work_items.description: Test docker compose up with PostgreSQL, verify full flow: setup -> run -> serve -> approve

work_items.title: Branch protection + Dependabot auto-merge
work_items.description: Configure GitHub branch protection rules and Dependabot auto-merge for patch updates

work_items.title: Ruff cleanup to <= 20
work_items.description: Fix remaining 30 ruff warnings in targeted files
